tool_args.label: Hudson Rail Link Bus Service Contract Modification

payload.description: Modification to exercise the second three-year renewal option and provide additional funding for continuation of Hudson Rail Link bus services

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North Railroad ("MNR") is seeking Board approval to (1) exercise the second and final three-year renewal option to a contract for Hudson Rail Link ("HRL") bus service with Arrow Rail Link Service, Inc. ... from October 1, 2023, through September 30, 2026; and (2) provide additional funding in the amount of $8,684,603

Modification to the contract for Hudson Rail Link Bus Service in order to (1) exercise the second three-year renewal option and (2) provide additional funding to the contract for the continuation of bus services.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer
evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block
warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

payload.description: Fixed-route scheduled feeder bus service operated by Metro-North Railroad

evidence_refs.source_quote: The HRL is a fixed-route scheduled feeder bus service that operates between MNR's Spuyten Duyvil and Riverdale stations, as well as the surrounding neighborhoods located in geographically challenging areas in the northwest Bronx.
Arrow maintains and operates 16 MNR-owned buses to provide the scheduled HRL service to commuters, at a fare of $2.90 per ride, from Monday through Friday during peak and off-peak times.
